ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the movie */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue of the movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Release year of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the movie was produced */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Age rating or certification */,
  "production_budget" TEXT /* Detailed budget breakdown */,
  "domestic_box_office" INTEGER /* Domestic revenue */,
  "international_box_office" INTEGER /* International revenue */,
  "total_box_office" INTEGER /* Total revenue (domestic + international) */,
  "budget_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the budget and revenue */,
  "release_status" TEXT /* Status of the movie (e.g., released, in production) */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes (redundant with runtime but can be useful for consistency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casts" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the cast member is associated with */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "character_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "character_age" INTEGER /* Age of the character */,
  "actor_birthday" TEXT /* Birthday of the actor */,
  "actor_bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the actor */,
  "actor_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the actor's image */,
  "actor_imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the actor */,
  "character_rank" INTEGER /* Order of the character in the cast (e.g., lead, supporting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casts_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the director is associated with */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "director_birthday" TEXT /* Birthday of the director */,
  "director_bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the director */,
  "director_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the director's image */,
  "director_imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the production company is associated with */,
  "production_company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "company_headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company headquarters */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "company_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the company's logo */,
  "company_founded_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_companies_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user's email is verified */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is an admin */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object for user preferences (e.g., favorite genres, notification settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the review is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was written */,
  "review_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "review_dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  "spoiler_flag" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review contains spoilers */,
  "review_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user who wrote the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the rating is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was given */,
  "rating_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user who gave the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_companies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "production_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followers" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the follower */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "follower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_casts" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "cast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "director_id")
)
